column1: # BPM evaluation manifest — reference tempos for the offline accuracy harness.
#   - <path> may be absolute, or relative to the working directory you run from.
#   - lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
#   - <path> can be the original file (wav/mp3/flac) OR a decoded .wav cache.
#   - <refFirstBeatSec> is OPTIONAL: the time (seconds) of a known downbeat (e.g.
#     the first clear kick). Supplying it makes the harness also score PHASE
#     (how far the grid sits from the beat; ~+/-0.5 of a beat = on the off-beat).
# Run from the backend build dir, e.g.:
# Fill referenceBpm from a trusted source (Rekordbox, etc.). This file is a
# TEMPLATE — copy it to manifest.csv (gitignored) and edit with your own paths.
# Tracks seen during analysis this session (fill in the reference BPMs):
# C:\Users\irara\OneDrive\Music\Various Artists\12_ 80's Dance\2-02 Big Fun (12inch Mix).mp3
# C:\Users\irara\OneDrive\Music\Various Artists\12_ 80's Dance\3-02 Last Night A DJ Saved My Life (12inch Mix).mp3
